action.description:
Introduced by Senators L. Johnson, Larson, Dassler-Alfheim, Ratcliff and Spreitzer; 
cosponsored by Representatives Madison, Stubbs, Hong, Clancy, Phelps, Bare, DeSanto, DeSmidt, Goodwin, Joers, Johnson, Moore Omokunde, Ortiz-Velez, Prado, Sinicki, Stroud, Subeck, Tenorio and Vining
